content:
<action>
<tool>graph.plan</tool>
<objective>Populate the novel structure with content based on owner input.</objective>
<steps>1. Request premise and themes from the owner.
2. Populate project/premise.md and project/themes.md.
3. Populate setting/ files.
4. Populate character/ files.
5. Populate plot/ files.
6. Populate continuity/ files.
7. Populate manuscript/ files.
8. Verify content with artifact.audit.</steps>
<reason>The structure is ready, but the content is currently empty templates. A plan is needed to transition from scaffolding to content generation.</reason>
</graph.plan>
</action>
